CSEP (Critical Skills Employment Permit).title: Verify role is on Critical Skills list
CSEP (Critical Skills Employment Permit).description: Confirm occupation and salary meet CSEP criteria on enterprise.gov.ie.

CSEP (Critical Skills Employment Permit).title: Track CSEP application with employer
CSEP (Critical Skills Employment Permit).description: Follow up on DETE permit status before booking flights.

CSEP (Critical Skills Employment Permit).title: Book IRP / immigration registration
CSEP (Critical Skills Employment Permit).description: Schedule within 90 days of arrival — slots fill quickly in Dublin.

CSEP (Critical Skills Employment Permit).title: Track IRP card processing (14 weeks)
CSEP (Critical Skills Employment Permit).description: After applying, log your application date in Journey → Residency to count down the typical 14-week wait.

CSEP (Critical Skills Employment Permit).title: Review Stamp 4 eligibility timeline
CSEP (Critical Skills Employment Permit).description: Mark 21-month CSEP milestone for possible Stamp 4 application.

General Work Permit.title: Confirm Labour Market Needs Test completed
General Work Permit.description: Employer must show role was advertised unless LMNT exempt.

General Work Permit.title: Follow General Permit processing
General Work Permit.description: Permits can take months — don't resign current job until approved.

General Work Permit.title: Register IRP within 90 days
General Work Permit.description: Bring permit approval letter, passport, address proof.

General Work Permit.title: Track IRP card processing (14 weeks)
General Work Permit.description: Log your IRP application date in Journey → Residency to track days remaining.

General Work Permit.title: Start permit renewal paperwork
General Work Permit.description: Begin renewal 3–6 months before General Permit expiry.

EU Passport / EU Citizen.title: Bring valid EU/EEA ID or passport
EU Passport / EU Citizen.description: No employment permit needed — freedom of movement applies.

EU Passport / EU Citizen.title: Register residence (if staying 3+ months)
EU Passport / EU Citizen.description: Complete EU residence registration if required for your situation.

EU Passport / EU Citizen.title: Apply for PPS number
EU Passport / EU Citizen.description: Required for employment and most admin in Ireland.
